caption: The video shows two men standing on a stage, with one of them holding a microphone and appearing to speak. The man with the microphone is dressed in a white shirt and has a beard, while the other man, wearing a pink shirt and a black vest, stands beside him, listening attentively. Both men seem to be engaged in a formal event or presentation, possibly a conference or seminar. In the background, there is another person seated, wearing a mask, suggesting that the event might be taking place during a time when health precautions are being observed. The setting appears to be indoors, with curtains and a plain wall visible behind the speakers.
